characters.appearance: A 3D rendered humanoid robot. It has a smooth, pale, human-like face with blue eyes, dark eyebrows, and neutral makeup. The body is metallic silver and black, featuring mechanical joints and paneling.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, conversational, and slightly uncanny due to the AI animation.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: आप Red text पढ़ेंगे, और मैं Black. Let's start. [You will read the Red text, and I will read the Black. Let's start.]
Character A says: Okay. Understood. [Okay. Understood.]
Character A says: Hey, you look unusually happy today. What happened? [Hey, you look unusually happy today. What happened?]
Character A says: Oh man, I had such a great weekend! My friends and I went to a new cafe. [Oh man, I had such a great weekend! My friends and I went to a new cafe.]
Character A says: A new cafe? Where exactly? [A new cafe? Where exactly?]
Character A says: It's this beautiful spot near the lake. The vibe is incredible. [It's this beautiful spot near the lake. The vibe is incredible.]
Character A says: That sounds amazing. Was it crowded? [That sounds amazing. Was it crowded?]
Character A says: Yeah! It was packed, but totally worth it. The coffee was unreal. [Yeah! It was packed, but totally worth it. The coffee was unreal.]
Character A says: Now I'm jealous. Is it far from here? [Now I'm jealous. Is it far from here?]
Character A says: Not at all—maybe 20 minutes. You should definitely check it out. [Not at all—maybe 20 minutes. You should definitely check it out.]
Character A says: I will definitely visit. Alright, bye for now. [I will definitely visit. Alright, bye for now.]
Character A says: Supernova app के साथ, आप ऐसे ही real-life situations में मेरे जैसे AI partner के साथ English बोलने की practice कर सकते हैं। [With the Supernova app, you can practice speaking English in real-life situations like this with an AI partner like me.]
Character A says: बिना किसी झिझक के रोज़ practice करो, instant feedback पाओ, और अपना confidence बढ़ाओ। [Practice daily without any hesitation, get instant feedback, and build your confidence.]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova download करें! [Download Supernova today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the user with an interactive duet-style speaking exercise.
- Demonstrates a practical, real-world conversational scenario.
- Pitches Supernova's AI tutor feature, emphasizing daily practice and confidence building in a warm, encouraging tone.
- Ends with a clear call-to-action to download the app, removing specific pricing claims.
